creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->feedback

Hello Roger, 

Well it would help if you describe in your PR what kind of problems  
you are trying to fix. 

tinyproxy has already been at version 1.8.2 for months, so  
"Update to 1.8.2" is the wrong description. 

Patching both Makefile.am and Makefile.in is not necessary. 
Either you patch Makefile.am and then use the autotools, or you patch Makefile.in. 

Please check, what you actually want to fix and review your patch.
